description_long: This is a modern swivel chair with a soft, olive-green upholstered seat and backrest, featuring a smooth, continuous curve that forms integrated armrests. The seat has a wide, open lower back area, providing both comfort and ventilation. The chair is supported by a sturdy black metal central column that branches out into a five-pointed star base, each point ending in a caster wheel for easy mobility. The upholstery appears to be a synthetic or microfiber material, giving the chair a matte, slightly textured finish. The overall design is minimalist and ergonomic, suitable for office or lounge settings in urban environments. No visible adjustment levers or mechanisms are present, emphasizing a clean and streamlined appearance.
description: A modern olive-green swivel chair with integrated armrests, a curved upholstered seat, and a black five-caster star base. The design is minimalist and ergonomic, with a matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, curved seat with integrated armrests and an open lower back, supported by a black star-shaped base with casters.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the chair's deep seat, continuous armrest contour, and the central support column with visible casters.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, rounded backrest and the full width of the chair, with the black base and casters visible below.
description_view_3: Right-side view similar to the left, emphasizing the seat's depth, armrest integration, and the five-pointed caster base.
attribute_central_support_column: A black, cylindrical metal column that connects the seat to a five-pointed star base, likely fixed in height with no visible telescoping or adjustment features.
attribute_seat_back_design: The seat back is wide, gently curved, and medium height, seamlessly integrated with the armrests, upholstered in olive-green fabric with a smooth, unpatterned surface and an open lower back.
attribute_armrest_style: Integrated armrests formed by the continuous curve of the seat shell, upholstered in the same olive-green fabric, with no separate attachment or padding.
